programmes.show_description: The Dawn of Man: King of the grumps Victor Meldrew faces more bizarre situations. Victor's decision to take up fishing leads to an encounter with humankind at its most primitive.
Things Aren't Simple Anymore: The immensely moving final episode of the long-running sitcom, in which uber-grump Victor finally meets his maker. David Renwick leaves us with a twist.
The Futility of the Fly: The cloth cap-sporting old sourpuss hires a cleaner to help out around the house, which creates more problems than it solves and sets off bizarre events.
Threatening Weather: A sweltering summer's night during a power cut proves to be a trying time for Victor as a couple decide to test drive Victor's car without actually taking it.
The Dawn of Man: King of the grumps Victor Meldrew faces more bizarre situations. Victor's decision to take up fishing leads to an encounter with humankind at its most primitive.
Things Aren't Simple Anymore: The immensely moving final episode of the long-running sitcom, in which uber-grump Victor finally meets his maker. David Renwick leaves us with a twist.
Paramedic Kim climbs into a crushed car balanced over a fast-flowing river, while services across the Pennines are paralysed when a man plunges from a bridge onto a busy rail line.
Shopping from Home.
The medics spring into action when a cyclist plunges down a cliff in a freak accident. A homeowner's booby trap - designed to deter burglars - sparks a major rescue operation.
A landslip at a construction site traps a worker under tons of earth. Reports of a riot at a school come in and medic Alex must lead the operation to treat the injured.
A car crash victim has to be put into an induced coma at the roadside. Andy is called in to stand by as bomb disposal experts deal with a mortar dating back to the Boer War.

Attempts to contain the maggot threat escalate as the Doctor grows suspicious of Global Chemicals' true power source and leadership.
While investigating the disappearances of top scientists, the Doctor and Sarah Jane trace the mystery to medieval England, where a stranded alien warrior is manipulating events.
The Doctor attempts to rescue the captured scientists as Sarah Jane uncovers the truth about the alien's influence over the local warlord.
Tensions rise in the castle as the Doctor works to thwart the alien's technology, while Sarah Jane inspires the oppressed villagers to resist.
The Doctor confronts the alien's plan to alter Earth's history, leading to a decisive showdown.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programmes.show_description: The Doctor and Sarah Jane return to a strangely deserted London, soon discovering that dinosaurs are mysteriously appearing in the empty streets.

Shopping from Home.
Brother-and-sister paramedics Sam and Hannah receive a call to assist police with a man they suspect has taken the powerful psychoactive drug 'Monkey Dust'.
Jo and Ash deal with a patient whose chronic cough leaves him struggling to breathe, while Joel and Nic treat a man who's fallen from a ladder while wielding a hedge trimmer.
Stuart and Anna help a lady in excruciating pain, Laura and Kerri treat a man with a history of breathing difficulties, and V and Ollie attend to a baby with a soaring temperature.

Passionfruit: The final series of the sitcom about odd couple Daphne and Sam. Daphne finds it hard to come to terms with Sam's growing friendship with Rhonda.
On the Radio: Series four of the sitcom about flat-sharing in-laws. Daphne confronts Sam's new girlfriend, while Angie gets a screen test for a TV commercial.
Omelettes and Optimism: British domestic sitcom. Sam and Daphne's newly discovered friendship creates a problem for Sam and Rhonda.
Golf: Domestic sitcom. Sam has arranged a surprise for Daphne, but when she tells him that she is not free, he is disappointed and decides to find out why.
The Driving Test: British domestic sitcom. While Angie prepares for her test, Daphne is busy with her own project.
Cheltenham: Final episode of the domestic sitcom. Sam's visit to Cheltenham for lunch with Nanny Parker is a big hit, but things start to go downhill on the way back to London.
